name: Batched Long-History PCA for Portfolio Optimization
gpu_optimization_points: Orchestrating cuBLAS and cuSOLVER calls efficiently to minimize host-device synchronization.
Fusing the normalization, idiosyncratic variance computation, and covariance assembly into custom CUDA kernels to save memory bandwidth.
Using batched routines where available (e.g., batched GEMM) to maximize GPU utilization across the independent simulations.
